name: Fire Watch — Industrial Boiler Startup
description: Safety monitoring procedure for boiler startup sequence. Operator must complete each step in order before energizing burners.

steps.description: Verify SCADA dashboard is open and boiler unit is selected
steps.hint: Open the SCADA HMI and select Boiler Unit 1 from the equipment panel.

steps.description: Confirm pre-purge timer is running (300 seconds minimum)
steps.hint: The pre-purge cycle must complete before burner ignition is allowed.

steps.description: Check combustion air damper is at 100% open position
steps.hint: Damper position indicator should read 100% or OPEN before proceeding.

steps.description: Verify gas pressure is within safe operating range (5-15 PSI)
steps.hint: Gas supply pressure must be within range. If not, stop and call gas company.
Click Ignite Pilot on the SCADA panel. Confirm pilot flame indicator lights.

steps.description: Confirm main burner flame established and flame scanner active
steps.hint: Flame scanner LED should turn green. Burner status should show FIRING.
